about.title: About <1>Me</1>
about.bio: Full-stack developer specializing in web and mobile development, currently working at UBS as a Software Developer Trainee. Passionate about building scalable, user-friendly applications using modern technologies. I believe in "Never Stop Learning" and constantly explore new tools and frameworks to deliver elegant solutions to complex problems. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects and sharing knowledge with the developer community.

ubs.description: FullStack Developer · Web & Mobile. Working on full-stack development at UBS, focused on web and mobile applications.

cashme.description: Development of scalable microservices using Java and Spring Boot, within the context of after-sales for financial operations. Responsible for critical integrations with banking APIs, electronic signature and facial recognition services, as well as automated generation of contracts, reports and legal documents.

sempher.description: Web Developer - React + Material UI. Integration with APIs and interface construction.

hubcontrol.description: Full-stack development with focus on web applications, working with CakePHP, RabbitMQ and modern technologies.

wi7h.description: Web Developer. Responsible for developing and maintaining Systems, Websites, Mobile Applications and E-commerce.
